title: Freshworks Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Freshworks Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Freshworks Ventures Solutions:
Freshworks Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks Ventures Solutions!
